title: cynosurus effusus var. obliquatus
intro: Cynosurus effusus var. obliquatus, also known as a variety of the dog's tail grass, is a type of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Cynosurus effusus var. obliquatus include its potential to reduce inflammation and promote wound healing, as well as its use in treating digestive issues and fever. The plant can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
